mapper.select: select count(*) from br_wishlist where member_no = #{memberNo} and book_no = #{bookNo}
mapper.insert: insert into br_wishlist(no, member_no, book_no) values(seq_br_wishlist_no.nextval, #{memberNo}, #{bookNo})
mapper.delete: delete from br_wishlist where member_no = #{memberNo} and book_no = #{bookNo}
mapper.select: select w.no, w.member_no as memberNo, w.book_no as bookNo , to_char(w.reg_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as regDate , b.title as bookTitle, b.cover , b.review_count as reviewCount, b.avg_rating as avgRating from br_wishlist w join br_book b on b.no = w.book_no where w.member_no = #{memberNo} order by w.no desc
